description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Complete a new membership application as a full-time sworn officer and choose the lowest-cost monthly dues option that does not exceed $55 per month, then submit the application with the specified personal details.

tasks.instruction: Find an in-person training session on officer safety within about 50 miles of ZIP 80202 between June and August 2025, then register for the earliest one and add it to your trainings list.

target_names: Registration for Officer Safety Foundations (Denver) on June 10, 2025

tasks.instruction: View individual health plans with monthly premiums under $180, compare at least two of them, and save the plan that has the lowest annual deductible, breaking any ties by choosing the one with the lower premium.

tasks.instruction: File a new grievance about being assigned to an overnight shift in mid-January 2025 without proper notice, classify it under scheduling or overtime, and assign it to your District 3 representative before submitting.

expected_values.subject: Overnight shift assignment without proper notice
expected_values.description: I was assigned to an overnight shift on 01/15/2025 with less than 24 hours notice, which I believe violates our scheduling provisions.

tasks.instruction: Use the representatives directory to find the representative for District 3 and send them an internal message in the "Contract Question" category asking about patrol car equipment.

expected_values.message_subject: Patrol car equipment allocation under current contract
expected_values.message_body: I would like clarification on how patrol car equipment allocations are handled under the current contract.

tasks.instruction: From the list of upcoming union meetings, RSVP to the next meeting that falls on a weekday and starts at or after 6:00 PM, and add it to your personal events list.

target_names: RSVP for General Membership Union Meeting  April 2026

tasks.instruction: Use the PAC donation tool to set up a recurring monthly $40 donation starting on the first day of next month, designating it for PAC or political action and paying with your saved "Union Card" method.
